note: The 12 electrical pricing categories + novel. category_id is stable; descriptions are the human/AI Option-B reference (the prompt-2 harness reads this file). Descriptions are signed-off verbatim.

categories.name: Point Wiring
categories.description: Wiring of individual points (light/fan/call-bell/plug points): the per-point circuit from switch/DB to the outlet.

categories.name: Wiring & Cabling
categories.description: Cables/wires run as lengths: armoured/unarmoured power cable, copper/aluminium conductor, by core x size (sq mm).

categories.name: Switches & Sockets
categories.description: Modular wiring accessories: switches, sockets, plate-and-grid, face plates, regulators.

categories.name: DB & Switchgear
categories.description: STANDALONE distribution boards and protective gear: MCB, MCCB, RCCB, DBs, enclosures, isolators (loose / NOT built into a panel assembly).

categories.name: Networking
categories.description: Structured cabling/data: CAT6 cable, jacks, patch panels, racks (electrical-side data infrastructure).

categories.name: UPS
categories.description: UPS units and associated battery/backup supply.

categories.name: Conduit & Piping
categories.description: Conduits/raceway pipes carrying wiring: PVC/MS conduit, flexible pipe, by size.

categories.name: Industrial Sockets
categories.description: Heavy-duty/industrial power sockets and plugs, often IP-rated with integral MCB.

categories.name: CableTray / Raceway
categories.description: Cable support: cable trays, ladders, C-channel, threaded rod, junction boxes.

categories.name: Termination
categories.description: Cable end-work: lugs, glands, terminations, jointing of conductors.

categories.name: Earthing
categories.description: Earthing system: earth strips/plates/electrodes, GI strip, earth pits, bonding.

categories.name: Panels
categories.description: BUILT panel ASSEMBLIES (MCC/distribution/metering panels): a fabricated enclosure containing protective gear as one assembly (contains MCCBs/breakers/meters BY NATURE - that's what distinguishes it from standalone DB & Switchgear).

categories.name: Novel / route-to-human
categories.description: Matches no category; routes to human review.
